title: haplopappus integerrimus var. integerrimus
intro: Haplopappus integerrimus var. integerrimus, also known as the woolly goat's beard, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Haplopappus integerrimus var. integerrimus is often prepared for herbal use in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to topical applications.
